Template for reporting bugs in Flask, including sections for replication steps and environment details.

# Purpose
The YAML file defines a template for submitting bug reports related to the Flask project. It specifies the purpose of the report, which is to address bugs in Flask itself, not in projects that depend on Flask. The template includes sections for users to replace with specific information, such as a clear description of the bug, steps to replicate it, and the expected behavior. Additionally, it prompts users to provide details about their environment, including the Python and Flask versions. This structured format helps maintain consistency and clarity in bug reporting, facilitating efficient issue tracking and resolution.
